import React from 'react'; import { Link, Outlet, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../../context/AuthContext'; const InstructorDashboard = () => { const { user, logout } = useAuth(); const location = useLocation(); const navItems = [ { path: '/dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', icon: 'M3 12l2-2m0 0l7-7 7 7M5 10v10a1 1 0 001 1h3m10-11l2 2m-2-2v10a1 1 0 01-1 1h-3m-6 0a1 1 0 001-1v-4a1 1 0 011-1h2a1 1 0 011 1v4a1 1 0 001 1m-6 0h6' }, { path: '/instructor/courses', label: 'Cours', icon: 'M2 3h6a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v14a3 3 0 0 0-3-3H2zM22 3h-6a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v14a3 3 0 0 1 3-3h7z' }, { path: '/instructor/controls', label: 'Contrôles', icon: 'M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8zM14 2v6h6M16 13H8M16 17H8M10 9H8' }, { path: '/instructor/corrections', label: 'Corrections', icon: 'M9 11l3 3L22 4M21 12v7a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11' }, { path: '/instructor/research', label: 'Sujets de Recherche', icon: 'M21 21l-6-6m2-5a7 7 0 11-14 0 7 7 0 0114 0z' }, ]; const getRoleLabel = (role) => { const labels = { admin: 'Administrateur', instructor: 'Instructeur', coordinator: 'Coordinateur', supervisor: 'Superviseur', trainee: 'Stagiaire' }; return labels[role] || role; }; return (

Bienvenue,
{user?.first_name} {user?.last_name}

); }; export default InstructorDashboard;
